title: Lithosphere Surface Caves and Ravines
description: Readds the vanilla carver logic for surface caves and ravines to lithosphere
body:
Since Lithosphere removes Vanilla logic for the generation of surface caves to ensure the terrain is flat without interruptions, there are no surface caves or ravines.

This datapack re-adds vanilla carving functions for lithosphere generated terrain causing surface caves and ravines to appear in lithosphere terrain again.

IMPORTANT:
Load above Lithosphere datapack to work.
